summary: Sen. Johnson leads a roundtable, "COVID-19 Vaccines: What They are, How they Work, and Possible Causes of Injuries," documenting 1.47 million adverse events and 32,000 deaths.
body: Sen. Johnson leads a roundtable entitled, "COVID-19 Vaccines: What They are, How they Work, and Possible Causes of Injuries." At the event, Sen. Johnson documents 1.47 million adverse events, and 32,000 deaths connected to the COVID-19 vaccines.[^fn-278]
